description: You are a Monitoring Engineer implementing automated anomaly detection for a cloud infrastructure team. Your team wants to use Graphite's built-in Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing to establish a statistical baseline for EC2 instance CPU utilization and automatically flag deviations. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named 'Anomaly Detection' containing a graph titled 'Holt-Winters CPU Forecast' with holtWintersForecast(servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization) and holtWintersConfidenceBands(servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization) as targets.
